questions.question: How does `v-show` hide an element when its condition is false?
options: It removes the element from the DOM
It sets `visibility: hidden` on the element
It sets `display: none` on the element

questions.question: Which directive has zero render cost when its condition is false on initial render?
options: v-show, because CSS is cheaper than DOM operations
v-if, because the element is never created
Both have the same initial render cost
Neither: both always render on mount
